title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: dpdk bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for dpdk is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The dpdk packages provide the Data Plane Development Kit, which is a set of libraries and drivers for fast packet processing in the user space.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update DPDK to v24.11.3 [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-118668)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for dpdk is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The dpdk packages provide the Data Plane Development Kit, which is a set of libraries and drivers for fast packet processing in the user space.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update DPDK to v24.11.3 [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-118668)
